changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-common/src/reporter.rs:49-127

Coverage: 31.9% (15/47 lines)

Uncovered lines: 52, 66-67, 69-70, 72-73, 75, 88, 91-92, 96, 98-102, 105-106, 108-109, 111, 115-123, 125

Functions: CliReporter::emit (line 50), emit_plain (line 60), emit_styled (line 88)

CliReporter::emit dispatches to emit_plain or emit_styled based on terminal color support. Both functions handle all InitEvent variants (Header, Action, Warning, Error, Skipped, Finished). Tests should exercise CliReporter::emit with each InitEvent variant. Since these write to stderr, capture output or test the underlying formatting logic. The styled path uses colored::Colorize.
Add tests for reporter.rs emit_plain and emit_styled
